entities.name: individual
entities.context: the concept of a person independent of family and community

entities.name: exile
entities.context: the punishment of being banished or excluded from a community

entities.name: death
entities.context: the ultimate punishment, referred to in the context of past and present punishment

entities.name: police
entities.context: the authority that enforces law in modern society
